2605.07935.title: TraceFix: Repairing Agent Coordination Protocols with TLA+ Counterexamples
2605.07935.paper_summary: We present TraceFix, a verification-first pipeline for Large Language Model (LLM) multi-agent coordination. An agent synthesizes a protocol topology as a structured intermediate representation (IR) from a task description, generates PlusCal coordination logic, and iteratively repairs the protocol using counterexamples from the TLA+ model checker (TLC) until verification succeeds. Verified process bodies are compiled into per-agent system prompts and executed under a runtime monitor that rejects out-of-topology coordination operations. On 48 tasks spanning 16 scenario families, all tasks reach full TLC verification; 62.5% pass on the first attempt and none requires more than four repair iterations. State spaces span six orders of magnitude yet verification completes in under 60 s for every task. A 3,456-run runtime comparison shows that topology-monitored execution achieves the highest task completion (89.4% average, 81.5% full) and that runtimes using the verified protocol degrade at roughly half the rate of prompt-only and chat-only baselines when model capability is reduced. A paired ablation under a fixed runtime shows that TLC-verified protocols cut deadlock/livelock (DL/LL) from 31.1% to 14.1%, with the largest separation under fault injection.
2605.07935.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 TraceFix，一個以驗證為先的多代理協調大型語言模型（LLM）流程。代理從任務描述中合成一個協議拓撲，作為結構化的中介表示（IR），生成 PlusCal 協調邏輯，並使用來自 TLA+ 模型檢查器（TLC）的反例迭代修復該協議，直到驗證成功。經過驗證的過程主體被編譯成每個代理的系統提示，並在運行時監控下執行，該監控會拒絕超出拓撲的協調操作。在涵蓋 16 種場景系列的 48 項任務中，所有任務都達到了完整的 TLC 驗證；62.5% 在第一次嘗試中通過，且沒有一項需要超過四次修復迭代。狀態空間跨越六個數量級，但每項任務的驗證都在 60 秒內完成。一次 3,456 次運行的運行時比較顯示，拓撲監控執行實現了最高的任務完成率（平均 89.4%，完整 81.5%），而使用經過驗證的協議的運行時間在模型能力降低時的降級速度約為僅提示和僅聊天基準的一半。在固定運行時間下的配對消融顯示，TLC 驗證的協議將死鎖/活鎖（DL/LL）從 31.1% 降至 14.1%，在故障注入下分離最大。
2605.07935.author: Shuren Xia et.al.
2605.07935.authors: Shuren Xia, Qiwei Li, Taqiya Ehsan, Jorge Ortiz
